reasoning: RULE A applied — get_traditional_arts is a defensible tool for a craftsman-skills query (183 文化庁+UNESCO ICH records include intangible craft designations). This is a reasoning/routing failure: the system synthesised the wrong subcategory cluster to surface. The underlying 183 records likely contain actual craft arts (dyeing, weaving, lacquer, ceramics), but they are invisible in the truncated response. RULE B: single root cause (wrong subcategory foregrounded) — intent_understanding takes the main hit (2); practical_usefulness drops proportionally (2); specificity drops only 1 step (3) since named entities are specific even if wrong-topic.
